element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Addresses defensive advantage from previous games; meter drains during running and combos
Pre-programmed button sequences that cannot be interrupted once first hit connects; can launch into juggle combos
Uppercuts (normal or combo-based) transition characters between stages; changes level cycle dynamically
Restores opponent health after winning two rounds; prerequisite for performing Animality
Character transforms into animal to kill opponent; requires Mercy execution first
Three stages featured: Subway, Bell Tower, Pit 3; stage-dependent execution
Six-symbol codes entered at VS screen to unlock features, modify gameplay, fight hidden characters
Ten-character code entered at game-over screen; unlocks robotic Smoke character
Pre-match screen allows player-selectable difficulty to accommodate skill levels
Departure from tournament storyline; Shao Kahn resurrets Sindel, invades Earthrealm

typical_relief_triggers: Stage transition (uppercut breaks tension of single arena)
typical_tension_triggers: Run meter limitation restricts player aggression
Uninterruptible chain combos force defensive commitment
Opponent has equal access to combo and transition tools
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Quick-paced arcade fighting with momentum shifts via run mechanics and interactive stage breaks; complexity ramps through combo depth and multi-round setup requirements

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Kombat Codes unlock hidden characters and cosmetic/gameplay modifiers without requiring discovery
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Ultimate Kombat Code for Smoke character; arcade operator reset via diagnostic menu suggests hidden depth

difficulty_curve.early_game: Player-selectable via Choose Your Destiny screen; accommodates novice to advanced skill levels
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponent AI adapts to chain combo and run meter usage; stage transitions increase spatial unpredictability
difficulty_curve.late_game: Shao Kahn boss encounter represents narrative and mechanical peak
notable_spikes: First exposure to uninterruptible chain combos (mid-game learning curve)
Stage transitions during high-stakes rounds (momentum disruption)
Shao Kahn final boss with resurrection narrative (narrative + mechanical escalation)

notable_level_patterns.description: Certain moves (uppercuts, Kung Lao's Whirl Wind Spin) trigger dynamic level changes mid-match. Both fighters continue battle in new stage. Defeat via uppercut prevents transition. Alters expected level cycle.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any stage with ceiling (Subway, Bell Tower implied)

notable_level_patterns.description: Three stages feature stage-specific Fatality executions: Subway, Bell Tower, Pit 3. Implies environmental hazards or objects integrated into finishing mechanics.
Animality requires two-round victory followed by Mercy execution before final Animality. Creates meta-rhythm of restraint (Mercy) enabling ultimate finishing power.
